title: Kilner Square Clip Top Jar 2L (2000ml) Airtight Glass Jar for Pickling Large Vegetables Preserving Whole Fruits and Storing Biscuits Cereals Pasta Dry Foods
features: STORE HOMEGROWN FOODS | The Kilner 2 litre clip top jar is perfect for preserving healthy, home grown foods, the contemporary square jar shape is space saving making it ideal for pantry storage, the jar capacity is 2 litre / 2000 ml which is the perfect size for pickling large vegetables, preserving whole fruits and storing dry foods like biscuits, cereals and pasta
KEEP THINGS FRESH | This storage jar assures an airtight seal that keeps contents fresher for longer
REUSE, REFILL, RECYCLE | Made in England using 30 percent recycled glass from kerbside collection services, these sustainable jars are reusable time and time again

NATURAL MATERIALS | Made from high-quality BPA-free soda-lime glass, this bottle does not absorb odours, flavours, or stains, not only is glass a healthier option, but it is also made to last and never for single use
THE KILNER STORY | Invented by john kilner and co, in england, the original kilner jar is as much loved and successful now as it was over 180 years ago
